# pfsense_firewall_nat_outbound (Data Source)

Firewall NAT Outbound rule data source. Look up a single outbound NAT rule by description.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "pfsense_firewall_nat_outbound" "example" {
  description = "LAN to WAN outbound NAT"
}

output "nat_outbound_interface" {
  value = data.pfsense_firewall_nat_outbound.example.interface
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `description` (String) Description used as the unique identifier for this NAT outbound rule.

### Read-Only

- `destination_address` (String) Destination network.
- `destination_not` (Boolean) Invert the destination address match.
- `destination_port` (String) Destination port or port range.
- `disabled` (Boolean) Whether this outbound NAT rule is disabled.
- `interface` (String) Network interface this outbound NAT rule applies to.
- `nat_port` (String) Translation port.
- `no_nat` (Boolean) Disable NAT for matching traffic (exclusion rule).
- `no_sync` (Boolean) Do not synchronize this rule to HA peer.
- `pool_options` (String) Pool options for translation address.
- `protocol` (String) Protocol.
- `source_address` (String) Source network.
- `source_hash_key` (String) Source hash key.
- `source_not` (Boolean) Invert the source address match.
- `source_port` (String) Source port or port range.
- `static_nat_port` (Boolean) Static port (do not randomize source port).
- `target` (String) Translation address type.
- `target_ip` (String) Translation IP address.
- `target_ip_subnet` (String) Translation subnet bits.
